title: TrollPlugin
description: A plugin that adds a lot of fun trolling of players: chat inversion, inventory chaos, and much more
body:
Сделай этот текст что бы я мог написать его на Modrinth
TrollPlugin - Powerful Tools for Trolling on Minecraft Servers
🧪 TrollPlugin is a lightweight and functional Minecraft plugin that allows server administrators to harmlessly troll players with a variety of customizable tools. The plugin offers a variety of fun effects that do not harm the gameplay, but add fun to the server.

🔧 Features
🎭 Trolling Menu - Intuitive menu with 10 different effects to choose from
🚀 Player Bounce - Send the player into the air with adjustable strength
💣 TNT Explosions - Create an explosion near the player (with adjustable strength and block breaking)
🤢 Nausea Effect - Apply nausea and blindness effects to the player
❄️ Freeze - Immobilize the player completely for a set amount of time
🔮 Mirror World - Invert the world colors for the player
📝 Chat Inversion - Flip chat messages backwards
🎒 Inventory Mess - Shuffle the contents of the player's inventory
🔄 Control Inversion - Invert the player's control movements
☁️ Sky Drop - Teleport the player to the sky and back
🌀 Random Teleport - Constantly teleport the player to random places

🌍 Multilingual support
Automatic detection of the player's client language
English and Russian language support
Easy addition of new languages
⚙️ Security settings
Protection against self-trolling

Protection of OP players from trolling
Command cooldown system
Limitation of the number of targets per administrator
Safe teleportation with protection against the void

📥 Installation
Drag the TrollPlugin-1.16-1.20.1-1.0.jar file to the plugins folder of your server
Restart the server
Configure the configuration in the config.yml file if necessary
Use the /troll <player> command to open the trolling menu

🎮 Commands
/troll <player> - Open the trolling menu for the specified player
/trollreload - Reload the plugin configuration

🔐 Access rights
trollplugin.use - Right to use the /troll command (default: OP)
trollplugin.reload — Permission to use the /trollreload command (default: OP)

📋 Configuration
The plugin offers detailed configuration via config.yml:

Power settings for all effects
Action durations
Security settings
Notification settings
Teleportation settings

🎯 Compatibility
Minecraft versions: 1.16.x - 1.20.1
Java: 17+
